name: ogow-health-weekly-performance-dashboard
description: Protected OGOW Health weekly performance dashboard with Google sign-in and Netlify functions.

scripts.check:functions: node --check netlify/functions/verify-google-auth.js && node --check netlify/functions/dashboard-data.js && node --check netlify/functions/public-config.js
scripts.check:all: npm run check:auth && npm run check:functions
